interventions.name: scaffolded_readout_vs_baseline_intervention
interventions.expected_effect: family patch separation should be preserved while readout score rises under scaffolded transport.

interventions.name: reasoning_slice_transport_intervention
interventions.expected_effect: joint object-to-readout and reasoning-slice transport should outperform readout-only contrast without collapsing into a global loop.

interventions.name: stress_guard_intervention
interventions.expected_effect: write should narrow before concept collapse, and stable-read should remain comparatively preserved.

interventions.name: anchored_relation_lift_intervention
interventions.expected_effect: family-anchored relation lift should retain relation coherence without losing object anchoring.

verdict.core_answer: P3 and P4 can now be advanced together through a small set of intervention designs that directly target the remaining encoding gaps.
verdict.next_engineering_target: execute these interventions in priority order rather than running separate benchmark and probe pipelines.
